message.content:
@startuml
title Weekly Rewards to Vaults

actor User as u1
actor Ops as o1
participant "«mStable»\nEmissions Controller" as ec
participant "«mStable»\nVaults" as v
database "«mStable»\nMTA" as mta

u1 -> ec : setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
note right of ec: proportions voting power across dials\nfor future distributions
ec --> u1 

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

o1 -> ec : calculateRewards () 
activate ec
note right of ec: Calculates and stores \nrewards for each dial
deactivate ec
ec --> o1 


o1 -> ec : distributeRewards ([dial ids])
loop Dials
    note left of ec: transfer MTA from Emissions Controller to Vault
    
    activate ec
    ec->mta:transfer(vault,rewards)
    
    deactivate mtas
    return 
    
  	ec-->v:notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
	note right of v:Stream MTA to Users
	
end loop


==After rewards have accrued==



User -> Vaulst:claimRewards()
note over vaults,mata:Transfer Mata From Vault To user
vaults->mata:user ,rewardss




@enduml
